summary_from_search: Evercore ISI maintained Outperform with $340 PT on April 17, 2026. Wolfe Research downgraded to Peerperform in January 2026 citing slower EPS growth vs peers. TD Cowen raised PT to $375 from $370, maintaining Buy. Consensus Buy from 16 analysts with avg PT of $329.62 as of April 20, 2026.
